does_home_tell_user_what_to_do_right_now.evidence: Decision-first ordering and digest summary now foreground blocking decisions and immediate attention items.

does_it_feel_like_a_daily_digest.evidence: Summary includes time framing and change awareness, with deterministic merge of actions/calendar/decisions into canonical root keys.

does_system_react_to_new_inputs.evidence: POST /ingest/message produces household_message_ingested and household_item_promoted, and promoted artifacts appear in replay + /home refresh flows.
